---
title: "universal.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\gungnir\universal.py"
loc: 107
complexity: 17
logic_score: 5.63
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.64
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `universal.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on UniversalGungnir, audit, audit_logic, _audit_logic_rules, _audit_style_rules, _audit_data_rules, _audit_structure_rules. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via UniversalGungnir, audit, audit_logic, _audit_logic_rules, _audit_style_rules, _audit_data_rules, _audit_structure_rules. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `UniversalGungnir`
- `audit`
- `audit_logic`
- `_audit_logic_rules`
- `_audit_style_rules`
- `_audit_data_rules`
- `_audit_structure_rules`
